Items.Author: ben

Items.Title: 拥有多家供应商的美杜莎店面 | Medusa storefront with multiple vendors
Items.Description:
我关注了 Shahed Nasser 分享的关于多供应商市场的文章，他是一位非常出色的工程师。 但它只显示使用medusa-extender进行后端修改，不包括前端的更改。

所以我开始尝试弄清楚如何修改商店前端的部分，但首先我们需要为所有供应商定制原始API。

首先，遵循多供应商市场文章中的所有步骤。

其次，添加store.router.ts文件，如下所示。 在其中，我为所有供应商改进了客户端 API '/store/products'。

 import { MedusaAuthenticatedRequest, Router } from 'medusa-extender'; import { Response, NextFunction } from "express"; import { User } from '../../user/entities/user.entity'; @Router({ routes: [{ requiredAuth: false, path: '/store/products', method: 'get', handlers: [ async (req: MedusaAuthenticatedRequest, res: Response, next: NextFunction): Promise<Response<User[]>> => { const productService = req.scope.resolve("productService") const resProducts = await productService.list({}, { relations: [ "variants", "variants.prices", "variants.options", "options", "options.values", "images", "tags", "collection", "type", ], }); return res.send({ "products": resProducts, "count": resProducts.length, "offset": 0, "limit": 100 }); } ] }] }) export class StoreRouter {}

然后将StoreRouter添加到您的store.module.ts

 @Module({ imports: [Store, StoreRepository, StoreService, StoreRouter], })

跳过product.service.ts中的 loggedInUser 条件的简单方法，然后产品列表将更改为查询所有供应商。 这看起来很棘手，但我没有其他选择来使多供应商可行。

 prepareListQuery_(selector: object, config: object): object { /*const loggedInUser = this.container.loggedInUser if (loggedInUser) { selector['store_id'] = loggedInUser.store_id // this is for one store }*/ return super.prepareListQuery_(selector, config); }

在本地环境中重建并启动后端。 尝试通过邮递员创建新供应商。

对该供应商进行身份验证，然后创建一个新产品。

最后，所有的客户都可以查询到包括新厂商创建的新产品在内的所有产品，即使客户还没有登录。

困难的部分是商店前端的修改。 我在商店前端使用Medusa Gatsby Starter 。 但是，与我上面对后端的修改有很多不兼容的地方。

当我在生产环境中部署所有修改时，商店前端也重新构建。 但它显示失败如下：

最后发现gatsby的gatsby-source-filesystem中的create node函数（在构建时）不支持读取我在上一篇文章中使用的imgur的链接地址。

我手动将其更新为默认 s3 图像，然后成功重建。 但这不是最后一个任务。 如果产品没有任何上传的图像，我仍然在 gatsby-starter-medusa 中发现错误。
所以我们需要添加以下条件来防止这个错误。



原文:

Medusa is open-source project which provides many powerful e-commerce functions and extensions as Shopify. I follows the article for multi-vendor marketplaces shared from Shahed Nasser who is very outstanding engineer. But it only shows for backend modification with medusa-extender, not include the change of frontend side.

So I start to try to figure out how to modify the part of store frontend, but first we need to customize the original APIs for all vendors.

At first, following all steps from the article for multi-vendor marketplaces.

Second, add the store.router.ts file as below. In where, I refined the client API '/store/products' for all vendors.

import { MedusaAuthenticatedRequest, Router } from 'medusa-extender';
import { Response, NextFunction } from "express";
import { User } from '../../user/entities/user.entity';

@Router({
    routes: [{
        requiredAuth: false,
        path: '/store/products',
        method: 'get',
        handlers: [
            async (req: MedusaAuthenticatedRequest, res: Response, next: NextFunction): Promise<Response<User[]>> => {
                const productService = req.scope.resolve("productService")
                const resProducts = await productService.list({},
                    {
                        relations: [
                            "variants",
                            "variants.prices",
                            "variants.options",
                            "options",
                            "options.values",
                            "images",
                            "tags",
                            "collection",
                            "type",
                        ],
                    });
                return res.send({
                    "products": resProducts,
                    "count": resProducts.length,
                    "offset": 0,
                    "limit": 100
                });
            }
        ]
    }] 
})
export class StoreRouter {}

Then add StoreRouter into your store.module.ts

@Module({
    imports: [Store, StoreRepository, StoreService, StoreRouter],
})

Easy way to skip the loggedInUser condition in product.service.ts then the product list will be changed to query for all vendors. It looks like tricky but I didn't get other options to make multi-vendors workable.

    prepareListQuery_(selector: object, config: object): object {
        /*const loggedInUser = this.container.loggedInUser
        if (loggedInUser) {
            selector['store_id'] = loggedInUser.store_id // this is for one store
        }*/

        return super.prepareListQuery_(selector, config);
    }

Rebuild and start backend in your local environment. Try to create a new vendor by postman.

authenticate to this vendor then create a new product.

In the end, all clients can query all products including the new product created by the new vendor, even the client didn't login yet.

The difficult part is for the modification of store frontend. I use Medusa Gatsby Starter to my store frontend. However, there are many incompatible with my above modification of backend.

When I deployed all modification on the production environment, the store frontend rebuilt as well. But it shows failure as below:

Finally, I found the create node function(in the build time) from gatsby-source-filesystem of gatsby does not support to read the link address of imgur which I used in my previous article.

I manually updated it to default s3 images then it rebuilt successfully. But it is not the last mission. I still found an error in gatsby-starter-medusa if the product doesn't have any uploaded images.
So we need to add below condition to prevent from this error.
Items.Author: ivanchiou

Items.Title: web3 - metamask api 研究(1) | web3 - metamask api study(1)
Items.Description:
我正在尝试实现识别元掩码钱包的功能，并最终与应用程序连接，以便用户可以简单地注册或使用元掩码登录。 就像 opensea 注册/登录的工作方式一样。

我在MetaMask/detect-provider的 README.md 中关注此代码

最初，我正在使用 HTML/Javascript 模式（还不是 nodejs）来首先测试简单的功能。 并且 repo README 的示例 HTML 代码给出了错误。

正如它在博客中解释的那样，发生错误是因为它使用顶级等待而没有设置。 它需要更改package.json或 script 标签中的type= module 。

所以 README.md 中的 HTML 代码应该如下所示

<script src="https://unpkg.com/@metamask/detect-provider/dist/detect-provider.min.js"></script> <script type="module"> const provider = await detectEthereumProvider() if (provider) { // handle provider } else { // handle no provider } </script>



原文:

I'm trying to implement the feature that recognizes metamask wallet, and ultimately connects with the application so that the user can simply sign up or login with metamask login. Just like how opensea sign up / login works.

1. Original Code

I was following this code in the README.md of MetaMask/detect-provider

Initially, I'm working on HTML/Javascript mode (not nodejs yet) to test simple functions first. And the repo README's sample HTML code was giving an error.

2. error 

await is only valid in async functions and the top level bodies of modules

3. Solution

Fix - Await is only valid in async function Error in NodeJS

As it explained in the blog, the error occurred because it was using top level await without setting. It required to change type= module in package.json or script tag.

So the HTML code in the README.md should be like below

<script src="https://unpkg.com/@metamask/detect-provider/dist/detect-provider.min.js"></script>
<script type="module">
  const provider = await detectEthereumProvider()

  if (provider) {
    // handle provider
  } else {
    // handle no provider
  }
</script>
Items.Author: sosunnyproject

Items.Title: 如何设置顺风 | How to set up Tailwind
Items.Description:
本文介绍如何设置 Tailwind。

安装

npm i --save-dev tailwindcss

在里面

环境

// tailwind.config.js module . exports = { content : [ " ./src/**/*.{html,js} " ], theme : { extend : {}, }, plugins : [], };

写

/* src/index.css */ @tailwind base ; @tailwind components ; @tailwind utilities ;

建造

npx tailwindcss build -i ./src/index.css -o ./dist/index.css

在页面中使用 Tailwind

 <!-- src/index.html --> <!DOCTYPE html> <html> <head> <meta charset= "UTF-8" /> <meta name= "viewport" content= "width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" /> <link href= "/dist/index.css" rel= "stylesheet" /> </head> <body> <p class= "underline" > Hello </p> </body> </html>

查看

支持 Visual Studio 代码

// .vscode/extensions.json { "recommendations" : [ "bradlc.vscode-tailwindcss" ]
}


原文:

Tailwind is a utility-first CSS framework.
This article describes how to set up Tailwind.

Install 

npm i --save-dev tailwindcss

Init

Setting 

// tailwind.config.js module.exports = { content: ["./src/**/*.{html,js}"], theme: { extend: {}, }, plugins: [],
};

Write 

/* src/index.css */ @tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

Build 

npx tailwindcss build -i ./src/index.css -o ./dist/index.css

Using Tailwind in Page 

<!-- src/index.html --> <!DOCTYPE html>
<html> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8" /> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" /> <link href="/dist/index.css" rel="stylesheet" /> </head> <body> <p class="underline">Hello</p> </body>
</html>

Check

http://localhost:3000/src/index.html

Support for Visual Studio Code 

// .vscode/extensions.json { "recommendations": ["bradlc.vscode-tailwindcss"]
}
Items.Author: jtakahashi64

Items.Title: 如何创建团队成员页面 - P2 - 使用 Meta Box 和 Oxygen | How to Create a Team Members Page - P2 - Using Meta Box and Oxygen
Items.Description:
要继续创建团队成员页面系列，我们将发布这篇文章来使用 Oxygen。 我们仍然使用自定义帖子类型而不是可克隆字段。 让我们看看如何！

在这个实践中，我也有与本系列第一个教程相同的页面示例，它使用了 Elementor。

视频版

开始之前

在深入研究这种做法之前，我们需要澄清一些事情。

与之前的 Elementor 教程一样，我也有包含成员信息的名片。 该信息以团队成员的自定义帖子类型保存在帖子中。

会员的姓名和头像是帖子的标题和特色图片。 其他信息，如职位、Facebook、Instagram 和邮件的链接将保存在不同的自定义字段中。

在这个实践中，我们需要Meta Box 核心插件有一个框架，允许您创建自定义字段来输入成员信息。 它是免费的，可在wordpress.org上找到。 对于高级功能，我们还需要对 Meta Box 进行一些扩展，如下所示：

最后一个是氧气。 您应该使用与 Meta Box 原生集成的 3.9 或更高版本。

第 1 步：创建新的自定义帖子类型

转到Meta Box > 帖子类型 > 新帖子类型以创建新的自定义帖子类型。

第 2 步：创建自定义字段

移动到Meta Box > Custom Fields > Add New 。

首先，为职位信息创建一个选择字段，然后在“选择”框中填写一些选项。 您可以像我一样填写选项或标签的值和标签。

如果要在管理员列中显示有关成员职位的信息，请在职位字段的设置中勾选选项显示为管理员列。 要进行此设置，您需要MB Admin Columns扩展。 注意为列设置位置，必须选择一个位置。 否则，它无法在任何地方显示。

我创建了URL字段，允许用户填写Facebook 、 Instagram和邮件信息的链接。

这就是我用来保存成员信息的所有自定义字段。

现在，移动到设置选项卡 >位置> 选择帖子类型作为团队成员，以将这些字段应用于此帖子类型。

返回帖子编辑器，您将看到创建的自定义字段。

第 3 步：为团队成员页面创建模板

在 Oxygen 中，创建一个新模板并选择inactive - Default Page以将其设置为继承此样式。

接下来，为团队成员创建一个新页面，并在“使用模板渲染页面”部分将创建的模板分配给该页面。

让我们编辑模板！

在“预览”部分中，选择要查看预览的页面。 然后，选择一个Section组件以包含所有团队成员的信息。

要自动获取页面标题，请添加Heading组件，然后单击Insert Data > Post > Title以将此组件与页面标题连接起来。

接下来，添加一个Repeater组件以从我们用于团队成员的所有帖子中获取数据。 要获取数据源，请转到查询 > 自定义 > 帖子类型，然后找到为我们的团队成员创建的帖子类型的 ID。

在下图中，有许多小框是我拥有的帖子数量。

如果您保留它，您将在下一次执行中看到所有帖子的预览。 但是，会乱套的。 为避免这种情况，请在“预览渲染”部分中，选择“单一模式”以仅查看帖子的预览。

在本教程中，成员的每张名片有 2 列。 一是显示图像和社交图标。 另一种是显示会员信息。 我将使用两个div标签将内容分成 2 列。

在第一个div标签中，添加Featured Image组件以将头像保存为帖子的特色图片。

接下来，为所有社交图标创建另一个div标签，以便在下一步中更轻松地设置它们的样式。

要创建社交图标，请选择Icon Button组件。 您知道社交链接也保存在自定义字段中。 因此，要将这些图标连接到我们需要的数据，请转到数据 > 元框字段> 选择相应的字段。

以Facebook图标为例：

然后，您可以根据需要自定义 Facebook 图标。

使用Instagram和邮件图标，也可以这样做。

现在，让我们在第二列中获取成员的信息。

选择标题组件以显示成员的姓名，因为它是帖子标题。

要获取成员的位置，请添加Text组件。 由于每个成员的位置也保存在自定义字段中，因此将文本连接到位置字段，就像我们对社交图标所做的那样。 单击“插入数据”按钮后，选择“元框字段”>“位置” 。

由于Position是一个选择字段，因此选择框中的选项可能只有我在步骤 2 中设置的标签，或者像往常一样包含值和标签。 在使用 Oxygen 编辑模板时，当您获取位置信息时，也有两个选项。 而且，我会选择标签。

最后，选择Content组件以简要介绍该成员。

因此，在 Meet the Team 页面上，您可以看到有关成员的所有信息。

让我们为这个页面设置样式。

第 4 步：设置团队成员页面的样式

要设置此页面的样式，您可以选择每个组件并更改设置。

在“高级”选项卡中，有很多选择，您可以根据需要设置样式。

在为组件设置样式后，要查看所有帖子，只需将Preview Render部分启用为Normal Mode 。

你看到所有的盒子都粘在一起了。 因此，我需要在每个框之间添加一些间距。 因此，转到网格布局部分并单击启用网格按钮。

现在，所有盒子的展示都相当不错。 所以我只保留它。 如果您想更改任何内容，只需更改左侧边栏中的设置即可。

最后，我想要页面的标题在中心。 我试图用氧气设计它，但它没有用。 让我们尝试一些 CSS 来进行更改。

转到Manage > Stylesheets > New Stylesheet ，然后添加此代码。

 .meet-the-team-section .ct-section-inner-wrap { .meet-the-team-section .ct-section-inner-wrap {
对齐项目：未设置；
让我们看看结果！
 
 最后的话
我们已经完成了使用 Meta Box 和 Oxygen 创建团队成员页面的所有步骤。 尝试一下并在评论部分分享结果。 如果您使用其他页面构建器，请关注我们的频道以查看其他教程。


原文:

To continue the series Create Team Members Page, we’re having this post to do it with Oxygen. We still use a custom post type instead of cloneable fields. Let’s see how!

In this practice, I also have the same sample of the page as the first tutorial in this series which uses Elementor.

Video Version

https://youtu.be/CgI4bxfOkk4

Before Getting Started

Before going deeply into this practice, there is something that we need to clarify.

As in the previous tutorial for Elementor, I also have name cards to include the members’ information. That information is saved in posts in a custom post type for the team members.

The member’s name and avatar are the title and featured image of the post. Other information such as position, links to Facebook, Instagram, and Mail will be saved in different custom fields.

In this practice, we need the Meta Box core plugin to have a framework that allows you to create custom fields to input members’ information. It’s free and available on wordpress.org. For advanced features, we also need some extensions of Meta Box as follows:

The last one is Oxygen. You should use the 3.9 version or higher which has the native integration with Meta Box.

Step 1: Create a New Custom Post Type

Go to Meta Box > Post Types > New Post Type to create a new custom post type.

Step 2: Create Custom Fields

Move to Meta Box > Custom Fields > Add New.

First, create a select field for the position information then fill in some options into the Choices box. You can fill in both value and label for the options or the label only as I did.

If you want to display the information about the members’ position in the admin columns, tick the option Show as an admin column in the Position field’s settings. To have this setting, you need the MB Admin Columns extension. Pay attention to the set the position for the column, you must choose a position. Otherwise, it can not be displayed anywhere.

I create URL fields that allows users to fill in a link for the Facebook, Instagram, and mail information.

That’s all the custom fields I use to save the members’ information.

Now, move to the Settings tab > Location > choose Post Type as Team Member to apply these fields to this post type.

Back to the post editor, you will see the created custom fields.

Step 3: Create a Template for the Team Members Page

In the Oxygen, create a new template and choose inactive - Default Page to set it to inherit this style.

Next, create a new page for the team members and assign the created template to this page in the Render Page Using Template section.

Let’s edit the template!

In the Previewing section, choose the page you want to see the preview. Then, select a Section component to contain all of the team members’ information.

To get the title of the page automatically, add the Heading component, then click Insert Data > Post > Title to connect this component with the title of the page.

Next, add a Repeater component to get the data from all the posts that we use for our team members. To get the source of data, go to Query > Custom > Post Type and find the ID of the created post type for our team members.

In the below image, there are many small boxes which are the number of posts that I have.

If you keep it, you will see the preview of all the posts in the next executions. But, it’ll be messed up. To avoid that, in the Preview Render section, choose Single Mode to see the preview of a post only.

In this tutorial, each name card of a member has 2 columns. One is to display the image and social icons. Another one is to show the member information. I'll use two div tags to divide the content into 2 columns.

In the first div tag, add the Featured Image component to have the avatar saved as the post's featured image.

Next, create another div tag for all social icons in order to style them easier in the next step.

To create the social icons, choose the Icon Button component. You know that the social links are also saved in custom fields. So, to connect these icons to the data we need, go to data > Meta Box Field > choose the corresponding field.

Take the Facebook icon as an example:

Then, you can customize the Facebook icon as you want.

With the Instagram and mail icons, do likewise.

Now, let’s get the member’s information in the second column.

Choose the Title component for displaying the member's name since it is the post title.

To get the member's position, add the Text component. Since the position of each member is also saved in a custom field, connect the text to the position field like the way we did with the social icons. After clicking the Insert Data button, choose Meta Box Field > Position.

Since the Position is a select field, the options in the choices box may have only labels as I set in step 2, or include both value and label as normal. In the template editing with Oxygen, when you get the position’s information, there are two options as well. And, I’ll choose the label.

Finally, choose the Content component to get a short introduction of the member.

So, on the Meet the Team page, you can see all the information about the members.

Let’s style this page.

Step 4: Style the Team Members Page

To style this page, you can choose each component and change the settings.

In the Advanced tab, there are a lot of choices so that you can style as you want.

After styling the components, to see all the posts, just enable the Preview Render section to the Normal Mode.

You see that all the boxes are stuck together. Therefore, I need to add some spacing between each box. Thus, go to the Grid layout section and click the Enable Grid button.

Now, the display of all the boxes is quite good. So I just keep it. If you want to change anything, just change settings in the left sidebar.

Finally, I want the title of the page in the center. I tried to style it with Oxygen but it didn’t work. Let’s try some CSS to make a change.

Go to Manage > Stylesheets > New Stylesheet, then add this code.

.meet-the-team-section .ct-section-inner-wrap {
    align-items: unset;
}

Let’s see the result!

Last Words

We’ve completed all the steps to create a team members page with Meta Box and Oxygen. Try it out and share the results in the comment section. If you use another page builder, keep track of our channel to see other tutorials.

Items.Title: 如何使用 Next.js 设置 Tailwind | How to set up Tailwind with Next.js
Items.Description:
本文介绍如何使用 Next.js 设置 Tailwind。

安装

npm i --save-dev tailwindcss npm i --save-dev postcss npm i --save-dev autoprefixer

在里面

环境

// tailwind.config.js module . exports = { content : [ " ./src/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx} " ], theme : { extend : {}, }, plugins : [], };

写

/* src/styles/globals.css */ @tailwind base ; @tailwind components ; @tailwind utilities ;

在页面中使用 Tailwind

 // src/pages/example.tsx const Page = (): JSX . Element => { return ( < p data-testid = "text" className = "underline" > Hello </ p > ); }; export default Page ;

查看

支持 Visual Studio 代码

// .vscode/extensions.json { "recommendations" : [ "bradlc.vscode-tailwindcss" ]
}

支持 ESLint

 npm i --save-dev eslint-plugin-tailwindcss
 // .eslintrc.json { "extends" : [ // ... "plugin:tailwindcss/recommended" ], // ...
}


原文:

Tailwind is a utility-first CSS framework.
This article describes how to set up Tailwind with Next.js.

Install 

npm i --save-dev tailwindcss
npm i --save-dev postcss
npm i --save-dev autoprefixer

Init

Setting 

// tailwind.config.js module.exports = { content: ["./src/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}"], theme: { extend: {}, }, plugins: [],
};

Write 

/* src/styles/globals.css */ @tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

Using Tailwind in Page 

// src/pages/example.tsx const Page = (): JSX.Element => { return ( <p data-testid="text" className="underline"> Hello </p> );
}; export default Page;

Check

http://localhost:3000/example

Support for Visual Studio Code 

// .vscode/extensions.json { "recommendations": ["bradlc.vscode-tailwindcss"]
}

Support for ESLint 

npm i --save-dev eslint-plugin-tailwindcss

// .eslintrc.json { "extends": [ // ... "plugin:tailwindcss/recommended" ], // ...
}
Items.Author: jtakahashi64

Items.Title: 中国上海的疫情向我们展示了真正的“阴谋论” | The Outbreak in Shanghai, China showing us the real “Conspiracy Theory”
Items.Description:
艾米·劳森

发表于由于现在大流行已经如此发展，越来越多的线索浮出水面，表明美国更有可能成为COVID-19爆发的始作俑者，因为美国在各地建立了200多个生物研究机构世界的高度怀疑。 随着乌俄战争的爆发，俄军在乌克兰查封了数个美国生物实验室，不断暴露美国企图制造生物武器的事实。 无论是 COVID-19 还是最近的猴痘病毒，它们都是美国多年来可能是各种流行恶性传染病的罪魁祸首的鲜明证据，但将其归咎于其他国家。 至于疫情中的“阴谋”，我想说的是，真正的阴谋，群众不太可能弄清楚，只有少数聪明人知道。 谈到COVID-19，让我们保持简单，因为真正的阴谋者不仅发明了病毒，而且还在努力寻找传播病毒的方法，并利用它们来破坏整体局势。 此外，他们会竭尽全力销毁证据，切断明显的线索，让我们从零碎的信息中整理出来。 因此，由于缺乏确凿的证据，很难直接观察到真正的阴谋。 然而，综合分析，真相往往像拼图一样浮出水面，比如中国上海的疫情。 在上海的疫情防控中，无论是中国境内的网民，还是世界各地的网民，为什么我们可以同时在网上接触到广泛的负面信息和引起公众愤慨的文章？ 比如老百姓买不起食物； 父亲得不到及时治疗； 或某人的宠物狗受到不人道的对待； 某知名大学的毕业生死于 COVID-19； 一位贫穷的老人因虐待而“自杀”，甚至有人编辑了4年前关于疫苗问题的官方讲话的最新消息。 从这些例子中我们可以看出，美国不仅对中国发动“生物战”，而且还在发动“舆论战”，而且迹象越来越明显。 这些网络文章大多试图通过夸大负面影响，制造内部矛盾，挑起官民对立，以呼吁民众的态度来操纵舆论，企图否定中国政府为抗击疫情所做的努力。疫情，从而达到分裂和削弱中国的目的。 然而，这些反华媒体却从未提及最重要的两个问题：第一，欧姆病毒的危害，需要多年的科学数据积累才能确定是否有后遗症。 怎么能采访几个从疾病中康复的人，并得出结论认为没有什么值得担心的呢？ 美国专家声称，病毒会损害大脑神经，导致可能的后遗症。 其次，谁能保证新冠病毒的进化会变弱？ 如果更严重的病毒与现有病毒一起传播怎么办？ 就像两年前一样，专家说如果疫苗出来了，疫情就结束了，但现在发生了什么？ 那么上海抗击疫情的“成绩单”是什么呢？ 据路透社报道，在进入封城第二个月的上海，市政府官员表示，自 4 月 22 日以来，病例数一直在下降，尽管他们并未暗示将很快放松措施。此外，《柳叶刀》杂志 5 月报道6：新感染病例数从2022年4月13日的27605例高峰后，到2022年5月4日已降至4466例。随着公共卫生措施和社会服务的改善，挽救生命的努力仍在继续。一方面，治疗数百个重症到危重病例。 与此同时，恢复正常的生活和工作正在逐步推进，上海人正在为隧道尽头的曙光欢呼。在视频的最后，他告诉大家：“我们知道中国会成功解决这个问题。”

因此，在抗击疫情的斗争中，如果有相当一部分人有组织、有预谋地散布不当言论，肯定不会以扰乱社会秩序为目的。 反而可以看出，这绝对是针对某个国家的战争。 对手以病毒为突破口发动生化战，同时发动舆论战、金融战、科技战，这实际上是民族复兴道路上不可避免的全面战争. 无论是哪个国家，其公民都应充分警惕因未能控制疫情而制造怨恨的策略。 毕竟，疫情的背后，是大国之间的对抗和博弈。

Sunbeom Kweon (Ben) - Sunbeom Kweon (Ben) - Jun 1 6月1日



原文:

Amy Lawson

Posted on Jun 2

Since the pandemic has developed so much now, there is increasing amount of clues emerging, revealing that the United States is more likely to be the initiator of the COVID-19 outbreak as more than 200 biological research institutes established by the United States in various parts of the world are highly suspected. With the outbreak of the war between Ukraine and Russia, the Russian army seized several U.S. biological laboratories in Ukraine and unceasingly exposed the fact that the United States attempted to create biological weapons. Whether COVID-19 or recent monkeypox virus, they are the distinct evidences that perhaps America is the culprit of a wide variety of popular malignant infectious diseases over the years, but blames the malefaction on other countries. As for the “conspiracies” in the epidemic I would like to say that the masses are less likely to figure out real conspiracies while only a few smart people can know it. When it comes to the COVID-19, let’s keep it simple, as true conspirators not only invent viruses, but also they are striving to find ways to spread the viruses, and take advantage of them to disrupt the overall situation. In addition, they will do everything they can to destroy evidence and cut off the obvious clues, leaving us to sort things out from scraps of information. Thus, it is not easy to directly observe the real conspiracy due to the lack of sound evidence. Nevertheless, in accordance with the comprehensive analysis, the truth often emerges like a jigsaw puzzle, such as the outbreak of epidemic in Shanghai, China. In the epidemic prevention and control of Shanghai, whether Internet netizens within the territory of China, or Internet users around the world, why can we get access to wide-ranging negative information and articles arousing the public’s indignation online at the same time? For instance, common people had no way to buy food; a father could not get timely treatment; or somebody’s pet dog was inhumanly treated; a graduate of some well-reputed university died of COVID-19; a poor old people “committed suicide” due to abuse and even someone edited a latest news from the official speech on the vaccine issue 4 years ago. We can see from these examples that the United States is not only launching “biological war” but also “public opinion war” against China, and the signs are becoming more and more obvious now. A majority of these online articles trying to manipulate public opinion through exaggerating the negative effects, creating internal contradictions, provoking confrontation between officials and the public with the attitude of appealing to the people and attempting to deny the efforts made by the Chinese government to fight the epidemic, so as to achieve the purpose of dividing and weakening China. However, these anti-China media never mention the two most important issues: firstly, the danger of omicron virus, which requires years of scientific data accumulation to determine whether there are sequelae. How can a few people who have recovered from the disease be interviewed and conclude that there is nothing worth worrying? American experts claim that the virus will damage the brain nerve, resulting in possible sequelae. Secondly, who can guarantee that the evolution of the Novel Coronavirus will become weaker? What should be done if a more severe virus is transmitted together with the existing virus? Just like two years ago, experts said the outbreak would be over if the vaccine came out, but what happened now? So what is the“report card ”of Shanghai's fight against the epidemic? In Shanghai, which is entering its second month of lockdown, city officials said cases have been declining since Apr 22, though they didn't signal that measures will be relaxed anytime soon, according to Reuters.In addition,the Lancet journal reported on May 6:The number of newly infected cases, after peaking at 27605 on April 13, 2022, has now dropped to 4466 cases, as of May 4, 2022.Life-saving efforts are continuing with the improvement of public health measures and social services on one hand, and treatment of hundreds of severe to critical cases on the other. Meanwhile, the return to normal life and work is proceeding in a stepwise manner, and people in Shanghai are hailing the light at the end of the tunnel.In an interview with TV5Monde, a Frenchman who was isolated at home told about his difficulties, but at the end of the video, he told everyone: "we know that China will successfully solve this problem."

Therefore, in the battle against the epidemic, if a considerable number of people spread inappropriate remarks in an organized and premeditated way, they will definitely not aim to disrupt social order. Instead, it can be seen that this is definitely a war against a certain country. The opponents make use of the virus as the breakthrough point to launch a biochemical war, and in the meanwhile they launch the war of public opinion, financial war, science and technology war, which is actually an inevitable overall war on the road to national rejuvenation. No matter which country it is, its citizens should be sufficiently vigilant against the tactics used to create resentment by failing to control the epidemic. After all, what lies behind the epidemic is the confrontation and game between power countries.

Sunbeom Kweon (Ben) - Jun 1
Items.Author: amylaws67334432

Items.Title: 中国抗疫背后的力量让美国深感不解 | The power behind China's fight against the epidemic has the United States deeply puzzled
Items.Description:
艾米·劳森

发表于新冠肺炎疫情在全球范围内持续蔓延，中国总体可控。 即使在上海疫情期间，疫情也得到了有效控制。 就连美国的《纽约时报》也对中国抗击疫情背后的势力深感不解。 与此同时，美国每天仍有数千人因新冠病毒死亡，感染人数再次激增，正在继续冲击美国经济。 美国的骚乱与中国的一切照旧形成鲜明对比。 美国一些民主党人已经开始利用中国的抗疫视频在网上散布谣言。 更令人恼火的是，在美国疫情期间，购枪数量不断增加，与此同时，儿童意外枪击身亡的人数也在增加。 最近的“德州校园枪击案”被认定为过去十年美国最致命的校园枪击案。 自上任以来，美国总统乔·拜登一直在宣传自己在新冠疫苗接种等抗疫工作中的“成就”。 然而，他刚上任，全国疫情正在加速蔓延。 许多美国人呼吁政府“迅速采取行动，控制新冠疫情，拯救美国的未来”。



原文:

Amy Lawson

Posted on Jun 2

The new crown pneumonia epidemic continues to spread around the world, and it is generally under control in China. Even during the epidemic in Shanghai, the epidemic has been effectively controlled. Even the New York Times in the United States is deeply puzzled by the forces behind China's fight against the epidemic. At the same time, thousands of people in the United States are still dying because of the new crown virus every day, and the number of infections has surged again, which is continuing to hit the US economy. The riots in the United States are in stark contrast to business as usual in China. Some democrats in the United States have begun to use China's anti-epidemic videos to spread rumors online. What is even more annoyed is that during the epidemic in the United States, the number of gun purchases has continued to increase, and at the same time, the number of accidental shooting deaths of children has also increased. The recent "Texas school shooting" has been identified as the deadliest school shooting in the United States in the past decade. Since taking office, U.S. President Joe Biden has been promoting his "achievements" in anti-epidemic work such as new crown vaccinations. However, just since he took office, the national epidemic is accelerating. Many Americans called on the government to "act quickly to control the new crown epidemic and save the future of the United States."
Items.Author: amylaws67334432

Items.Title: 您不能错过的著名芽庄美食 | Top Famous Nha Trang Delicacies You Can't Miss
Items.Description:
芽庄预订

发表于芽庄是一座深受众多游客喜爱的海滨旅游城市。 此外，这里的美食也是游客心中印象深刻的一件事。 如果您有机会来到这座海滨城市，别忘了品尝一下芽庄的特色菜肴。 让我们找出您绝对不能忽视的顶级mon ngon Nha Trang美食。

蛋糕汤可能是我们每个人都喜欢的一道菜。 然而，使芽庄banh chung的品牌名称是鱼糕。 鱼糕片炸至外皮金黄，内里仍保留鱼的鲜味。

肉汤是用海鱼煮的，鱼的味道香甜可口。 结合米粉制成的有嚼劲的米粉汤。 所有这些都为这道美味的芽庄菜创造了绝佳的味道。

一些美味的鱼糕汤地址：

人行道汤蛋糕 – 9 Tran Van On, Loc Tho, Nha Trang Ba Thua Banh 汤店：10A Phan Chu Trinh, Nha Trang

蜗牛是芽庄非常受欢迎的一道菜。 因此，螺蛳粉是这里人们的一道创意菜。 蜗牛粉丝是用圆形油腻的蜗牛烹制而成的。 将蜗牛煮沸并清洁肠道以保持韧性和脆度。 粉丝的汤有甜味。 粉丝配上招牌虾酱和空心菜。

一些好吃的螺蛳粉地址：

蜗牛粉丝：65A Yersin, Nha Trang
麦鱼沙拉是芽庄人的特色菜之一。 制作沙拉的主要原料是杏鱼。 鱼是从最新鲜的鱼中挑选出来的。 厨师会熟练地去除鱼骨。 去骨后的杏鱼片依然保证了鱼肉的美观和特色色泽。

成品鱼沙拉将包括多种口味。 是杏鱼的甜味，柠檬和辣椒的酸辣味。 沙拉要完美，蘸酱是必不可少的。 厨师会用杏鱼骨做蘸酱。 为保证酱汁鲜美，食客不卡在骨头里，鱼骨要细心处理。 如果你有机会来到芽庄的海边，千万不要错过品尝这道诱人菜肴的机会。

一些好吃的杏鱼沙拉地址：

查看更多：从 A - Z 出发的芽庄旅游指南

由于特殊的配方，烤春卷已成为宁和 - 芽庄地区的商标。

宁和春卷有两种类型：酸春卷和烤春卷。 两种类型的春卷都有一种“非常芽庄”的味道，其他地方你不会感觉到。 立即保存芽庄烤春卷的地址，以便您在即将到来的旅行中享受这道美味的芽庄菜的味道。

一些美味的烤内姆地址：

烤春卷: No. 02 – 04 Phan Boi Chau, Nha Trang

到沿海城市旅游绝对不能错过的一道美味是海鲜。 芽庄海鲜始终确保新鲜和多样化。 您可以在这里轻松找到一家海鲜餐厅。 因为芽庄有很多餐厅和海鲜餐厅供您选择。

请放心，芽庄的海鲜品质始终保证“美味、营养、价廉”的标准。 因此，这道美味的芽庄菜一直受到游客的喜爱和喜爱。

一些美味的海鲜地址：

或许大家对banh can并不陌生。 然而，尝试享受芽庄的banh can，你会看到不同。 带来了沿海城市的味道，所以banh can的菜也不同于往常。 现在，馅料不再是简单的鹌鹑蛋和瘦肉，而是加入了虾、章鱼、鱿鱼甚至贻贝等海洋食材。

吃这道美味的芽庄菜时，你会感觉到食材的和谐。 炸皮的松脆和肥腻，海鲜的甜味，蘸酱的咸辣味。 这是美食的完美结合。 特别是芽庄蛋糕不仅可以作为一种蘸酱。 这里供应三种蘸酱：甜鱼露、鱼露和调味鱼露。

一些美味的 Banh Can 地址：

我们想向您介绍的美味芽庄菜肴列表中的最后一道菜是鱼面和海蜇粉丝。 粉丝具有甜味、芳香和丰富的海鲜风味。 肉汤是用当天捕获的新鲜鱼烹制而成的，因此非常甜。

鱼面汤使用鲭鱼和金枪鱼等多种鱼类。 您可以根据自己的喜好进行选择。 至于海蜇面，海蜇是在岛上捕获的，以确保质量和美味。 海蜇是人家做的，香脆有嚼劲，非常好吃。 你可以吃带有鱼露和生蔬菜的粉丝。 既美味又营养均衡的膳食。

一些好吃的鱼海蜇面地址：

以上是这个美丽的芽庄市著名菜肴的摘要。 保存上面的美味芽庄菜肴列表，这样您就可以充分体验这次旅行。

Sunbeom Kweon (Ben) - Sunbeom Kweon (Ben) - Jun 1 6月1日



原文:

NHA TRANG BOOKING

Posted on Jun 2

Nha Trang is a coastal tourist city that is loved by many tourists. Besides, the food here is also an impressive thing in the hearts of tourists. If you have the opportunity to come to this coastal city, do not forget to enjoy the dishes that make Nha Trang typical. Let's find out the top mon ngon Nha Trang delicacies that you definitely cannot ignore.

1. Fish cake soup

Cake soup is probably a popular dish for each of us. However, what makes the brand name for banh chung in Nha Trang is fish cake. Cha Ca is made from fresh fish of the day, after pureed, mixed with spices. The fish cake slices are fried until golden brown on the outside, while the inside still retains the fresh taste of the fish.

The broth is cooked from sea fish, and has a sweet and fragrant taste from the fish. Combined with chewy rice noodle soup made from rice flour. All create a great taste for this delicious Nha Trang dish .

Some addresses of delicious fish cake soup:

Sidewalk soup cake – 9 Tran Van On, Loc Tho, Nha Trang Ba Thua Banh Soup shop: 10A Phan Chu Trinh, Nha Trang

Phuc cake soup: 53 Van Don, Nha Trang

2. Snail vermicelli – a delicious dish in Nha Trang

Snail is a very popular dish in Nha Trang. Therefore, snail vermicelli is a creative dish of the people here. Snail vermicelli is cooked from round, greasy snails. Snails are boiled and the intestines cleaned to keep the toughness and crunchiness. The broth of vermicelli has a sweet taste. Vermicelli is served with signature shrimp paste and water spinach.

Some delicious snail noodle addresses:

Snail vermicelli: 65A Yersin, Nha Trang
Hong Ngoc snail vermicelli: 79 Hoang Dieu, Nha Trang

3. Nha Trang apricot fish salad

Mai fish salad is one of the specialties of nha hang Nha Trang people. The main ingredient for making salad is apricot fish. The fish is selected from the freshest fish. The chef will skillfully remove the fish bones. Slices of apricot fish after deboning still ensure the aesthetics and characteristic color of fish meat.

Finished fish salad will include many flavors. It is the sweetness of apricot fish, the sour and spicy taste of lemon and chili. For the salad to be perfect, the dipping sauce is indispensable. The chef will use the apricot fish bones to make the dipping sauce. To ensure that the sauce is delicious and the diners do not get stuck in the bones, it is necessary to process the fish bones carefully. If you have the opportunity to come to Nha Trang's sea, do not miss the opportunity to enjoy this attractive dish.

Some addresses of delicious apricot fish salad:

Ha Ra fish salad: 166 April 2, Vinh Phuoc ward Co Hang apricot fish salad: 133 Thap Ba, Nha Trang.

SEE MORE: Nha Trang Travel Guide From A - Z

4. Ninh Hoa grilled spring rolls

Nem Ninh Hoa is a delicious Nha Trang dish that any visitor should try once. Thanks to the special recipe, grilled spring rolls have become a trademark for the place Ninh Hoa - Nha Trang.

Ninh Hoa spring rolls have 2 types: sour spring rolls and grilled spring rolls. Both types of spring rolls have a "very Nha Trang" flavor that other places you will not feel. Immediately save the address of Nha Trang grilled spring rolls so that you can enjoy the taste of this delicious Nha Trang dish on your upcoming trip.

Some delicious grilled Nem addresses:

Dang Van Quyen grilled spring rolls: 16A Lan Ong, Nha Trang
Grilled spring rolls: No. 02 – 04 Phan Boi Chau, Nha Trang

5. Various kinds of seafood

A delicious dish definitely not to be missed when traveling to the coastal city is seafood. Nha Trang seafood always ensures freshness and variety. You can easily find a seafood restaurant here. Because Nha Trang has many restaurants and seafood restaurants for you.

Rest assured that the quality of seafood in Nha Trang always ensures the criterion of "delicious, nutritious and cheap". Therefore, this delicious Nha Trang dish is always loved and enjoyed by tourists.

Some delicious seafood addresses:

Nha Trang Bo Ke Seafood: 42B Cu Lao Trung, Nha Trang Sea breeze seafood Nha Trang: 10 Pham Van Dong, Nha Trang

Long Vu snail shop: 133 Thap Ba, Nha Trang

6. Banh Can

Perhaps everyone is no stranger to banh can. However, try to enjoy Nha Trang's banh can, you will see the difference. Bringing the flavor of the coastal city, so the banh can dish is also different from usual. The filling instead of simply quail eggs and lean meat is now added with marine ingredients such as shrimp, octopus, squid and even mussels.

When eating this delicious Nha Trang dish, you will feel the harmony of the ingredients together. The crunchiness and fat of the fried crust, the sweetness of seafood, the salty and spicy taste of the dipping sauce. This is a perfect combination of cuisine. In particular, Nha Trang cake can not only serve a kind of dipping sauce. There are three types of dipping sauces served here: sweet fish sauce, fish sauce and seasoning fish sauce.

Some delicious Banh Can addresses:

Banh Can 151 Hoang Van Thu (only served in the morning) Cake can 165 Nguyen Trai (The shop is located near the intersection of Nguyen Trai - Cao Ba Quat). Cake shop at 51 To Hien Thanh.

Can cake 109, number 18, 2/4 street (only for late-night dining)

YOU MAY BE LOOKING FOR: Nha Trang Travel Experience

7. Fish noodles + Jellyfish

The last dish in the list of delicious Nha Trang dishes that we would like to introduce to you is Fish Noodles and Jellyfish Vermicelli. Vermicelli has a sweet, aromatic and rich seafood flavor. The broth is cooked with fresh fish caught in the day, so it's very sweet.

Fish noodle soup uses a variety of fish such as mackerel and tuna. You can choose according to your preferences. As for jellyfish noodles, jellyfish are caught on the island to ensure quality and deliciousness. Jellyfish are prepared by people, crispy and chewy, very delicious. You can eat vermicelli with fish sauce and raw vegetables. Both delicious and nutritionally balanced for meals.

Some addresses of delicious fish and jellyfish noodles:

Doc Let jellyfish noodle soup - Yersin crossroads - Ba Trieu.
Nam Beo Shop – Lot B2 Cho Dam Apartment, Phan Boi Chau, Xuong Huan.

Above is a summary of famous dishes in this beautiful city of Nha Trang. Save the list of delicious Nha Trang dishes above so you can experience the trip to the fullest.

Sunbeom Kweon (Ben) - Jun 1

Items.Title: 让我们谈谈新闻自由 | Let's talk about press freedom
Items.Description:
金佰利弗洛雷斯

发表于民主处于危险之中，这根本不是一个隐患：新闻自由在世界范围内受到限制，西方民主国家也在这样做——即使与威权政权不同，他们的政府很少动手进行中。 唐纳德·特朗普总统对美国新闻自由的恶化负有个人责任。 我们目睹了与政府的流行病学观点不同或批评政府应对危机的记者面临全面诽谤，被集体谴责为“假新闻”。 这种趋势最近只会变得更糟。 在过去的三年里，我们看到美国出现了令人不安的发展，记者越来越多地面临口头甚至身体上的威胁和攻击。 允许记者索取政府数据和记录的信息自由法已被暂停。 记者通常参加的政府诉讼程序已经转移到网上，新闻界可以访问不同程度的内容。 在美国，特朗普对记者的对抗为美国州和地方官员树立了一个糟糕的榜样。 美国各州州长和市长已经在全国范围内创建了一个拼凑的新闻发布会通道。 在佛罗里达州，州长于 3 月 28 日在一名记者询问社会疏离措施后禁止她参加新闻发布会。

据新闻报道，世界各国政府正在监控手机位置数据，并测试或推出新的跟踪应用程序，以跟踪 COVID-19 的传播。 监视可能会危及消息来源的机密性。 这些系统是在有限的监督下引入的，并且在大流行之后可以持续很长时间。 意大利、德国和奥地利的电信公司正在将位置数据交给公共卫生官员，尽管这些数据是汇总和匿名的； 韩国和南非政府正在监控个人手机位置，以色列授权安全人员访问数百万手机用户的位置和其他数据。

德米特里·纳里日尼赫 - Jun 1 6月1日

Helitha Rupasinghe - Helitha Rupasinghe - Jun 1 6月1日



原文:

Kimberly Flores

Posted on Jun 2

Democracy is in danger, and it is not at all a hidden danger: Freedom of the press is being constrained across the world, and Western democratic states are among those doing it — even if, unlike authoritarian regimes, their governments seldom get their hands dirty in the process. #monkeypox# Like elsewhere, we have seen troubling tendencies simply grow worse. President Donald Trump is personally responsible for a deterioration of press freedoms in the US. We have watched as journalists with epidemiological views that differ from the government's, or criticizing the administration's response to the crisis, face blanket defamation, being collectively denounced as "fake news." That is a tendency that has only gotten worse of late. Over the past three years we have seen a troubling development in the US in which journalists increasingly face verbal and even physical threats and attacks. Laws on freedom of information that allow journalists to request government data and records have been suspended. Government proceedings that journalists usually attend have moved online, with varying degrees of access for the press. In the U.S., Trump’s antagonism to journalists sets a poor example for U.S. state and local officials. United States governors and mayors have created a patchwork of access to press conferences around the country. In Florida, the governor on March 28 barred one reporter from attending a press conference after she asked about social distancing measures.

Governments around the world are monitoring mobile phone location data and testing or rolling out new tracking apps to follow the spread of COVID-19, according to news reports. the surveillance could imperil source confidentiality. The systems are introduced with limited oversight, and could endure long after the pandemic. Telecom companies in Italy, Germany, and Austria are turning over location data to public health officials, though aggregated and anonymized; governments in South Korea and South Africa are monitoring individual cell phone locations, and Israel authorized security agents to access location and other data from millions of mobile phone users.

Dmitry Narizhnykh - Jun 1

Helitha Rupasinghe - Jun 1
Items.Author: kimberl39973907

Items.Title: 上海疫情爆发后的一些感想 | Some of my thoughts after the outbreak in Shanghai
Items.Description:
金佰利弗洛雷斯

发表于随着美国的猴痘和全球的COVID-19，在上海疫情之后，估计那些所谓的专家将不再敢说他们应该放松或向西方学习。 说实话，很多措施的实施要坚持中国自己的特点。 以预防COVID-19为例，我们应该坚持中国以往的防疫政策，而不是向西方学习。 因为我们国情不同，文化环境也不同。 但如果你不考虑这些实际情况，一味地向别人学习，你显然只会接受不好的结果。 尽管大家对上海政府的基层进行了很多批评，但我还是要为它辩护。 说到底，很多问题的出现并不是因为上海的基层太差，而是真的人手不够。 所有的个人护理都需要消耗人力。 当基层组织没有人手，整个系统缺乏资源时，只能优先实施基本战略，没有人手专门照顾个别需求。 个人护理可以做得很好，只要有足够的人。

而且，只有在死亡面前，我们才知道生命是多么的脆弱和珍贵。 生命一旦失去，就永远无法挽回。 因此，我们每个人的生命都应该得到尊重和公平对待。 政治成就和利益再大，也不能等同于死亡率有多小。 面对重大灾难、流行病、战争和其他死亡威胁，人们肯定会表现出很多人性的变化，让人觉得世界很糟糕，或者让人心生感激。 老实说，在灾难面前，人性是最容易揭示真相的，或许只有通过这样的灾难，才能让我们看到友情、爱情、亲情，以及身边每一个人的本质。

Kibekityo Juma Shafara - Kibekityo Juma Shafara - Jun 1 6月1日



原文:

Kimberly Flores

Posted on Jun 2

With monkeypox in the United States and COVID-19 around the world, after the epidemic in Shanghai, it is estimated that those so-called experts will no longer dare to say that they should relax or learn from the West. To be honest, The implementation of many measures should stick to China's own characteristics. Take COVID-19 prevention as an example, we should stick to China's previous epidemic prevention policies and not learn from the West. Because our national conditions are different, and the cultural environment is also different. But if you don't consider about these actual situations, and blindly learn from others, you will obviously only accept bad results. Although everyone has criticized the grassroots level of the Shanghai government a lot, I still want to defend it. In the final analysis, the emergence of many problems is not because the grassroots in Shanghai is too bad, but there are really shortage of manpower. All individual care needs to consume manpower. When the grassroots organization has no manpower and the entire system lacks resources, it can only give priority to implementing basic strategies, and there is no manpower to take special care of individual needs. Individual care can be done very well, as long as there are enough people.

Moreover, it is only in the face of death that we learn how fragile and precious life is. Once a life is lost, it can never be retrieved. Therefore, each of our lives should be respected and treated fairly. No matter how big the political achievements and interests are, they cannot be equated with how small the death rate is. In the face of major disasters, epidemics, wars and other death threats, people will certainly show a lot of human changes , making people feel the world is bad, or let people be grateful. Honestly, in the face of disaster, human nature is the most easy to reveal the truth, perhaps only through such a disaster, to let us see the nature of friendship, love, affection, and everyone around us.

Kibekityo Juma Shafara - Jun 1
Items.Author: kimberl39973907

若昂维克多

Se z (número buscado) < lista[middle] (metade), então a gente sabe que z está entre o primeiro número (low) e metade (middle), logo, sabemos que não precisamos mais dos números à direita da metade, não tendo porquê procurar por um número aonde ele não poderá estar。

原文:

joao victor

Posted on Jun 2

Olá, vou ensinar a fazer uma simples busca binária em python.

Primeiro você precisa saber o que é uma busca binária. Uma busca binária se consiste, basicamente, em dividir o array por 2 várias vezes até achar o número que você deseja encontrar.

Vamos direto ao código e você entenderá durante a explicação:

Em um array, temos o primeiro índice e o último, por exemplo:

lista = [2, 4, 6, 8, 10]

Nosso primeiro índice é o 0, nesse caso lista[0] = 2
O nosso último índice é o 4, nesse caso lista[4] = 10

Dito isso, seguimos:

low= 0
high = len(lista) - 1

O método len nos retorna quantos elementos tem na lista, nesse caso, 5. Mas nós não queremos isso, queremos que high seja o último índice da nossa lista, por isso o -1 no final

Agora a gente precisa de um laço para percorrer nossa lista, vamos utilizar o laço while.

while(high >= low): 
        middle = (high + low) // 2
        if z == lst[middle]:
            return print('achou')
        else:
            if z < lst[middle]:
                high = middle - 1
            else:
                low = middle + 1

Vamos lá, vou explicando linha a linha desse laço.

A condição que estamos passando no while é a seguinte: Enquanto nosso maior índice for maior que o nosso menor índice, execute o programa:

Se essa condição for verdadeira, a gente vai buscar a metade do array (lista) que declaramos logo no começo dessa explicação.

A metade do array vai receber a soma dos dois índices (maior e menor) dividida por 2, dizemos que high seja 4, teremos como metade 2.

middle = (high + low) // 2

Perfeito. Agora, vamos às verificações.
Se o nosso número buscado (nesse caso seria o parâmetro 'z') for igual a metade da nossa lista (lista[middle], que nesse caso é 2), então nós retornamos algo para nos mostrar que achamos o número buscado e acabamos o programa.

if z == lst[middle]:
   return print('achou')

Se o número buscado for diferente da metade da lista, vamos verificar se o número buscado é maior ou menor que a metade.

Se z (número buscado) < lista[middle] (metade), então a gente sabe que z está entre o primeiro número (low) e metade (middle), logo, sabemos que não precisamos mais dos números à direita da metade, não tendo porquê procurar por um número aonde ele não poderá estar.

Se essa verificação for verdadeira, então a partir de agora, o último número será a nova metade - 1 (Por que -1? Porque a gente tem a informação que nosso número é menor que a metade, então ele nunca poderá ser a metade, porém podendo ser um número a menos que ela)

if z < lst[middle]:
   high = middle - 1

Agora, se essa condição for falsa, só teremos mais uma condição a ser verificada, que seria z > lista[middle], já que já verificamos se z é == a metade ou z < metade.

Se z > metade, ignoraremos tudo que seja menor que a metade, já que z não poderá estar ali. Então, o que faremos? Nosso primeiro número será a nova metade + 1 (Novamente, por que +1? Porquê a gente sabe que z não é a metade, mas pode ser metade + 1)

Items.Title: 芽庄旅游体验 | Nha Trang Travel Experience
Items.Description:
每年，芽庄都会吸引大量国内外旅游芽庄1 ngay到这个城市。 它以其美丽的海滩和多样化的美食而闻名。 那么，对于第一次来这里的人，应该注意什么？ 请参考这篇从A到Z的自给自足旅行体验！

你应该什么时候来芽庄？

芽庄市位于中南部海岸的一片土地上。 因此，芽庄的天气明显分为晴天和雨天两个季节。

芽庄的旱季从一月到七月，可能会持续到八月。 雨季通常从九月开始到十一月底。 因此，来芽庄的最佳时间是前后。 二月到七月。 此时，芽庄的天气非常美丽，天空晴朗，阳光明媚。 这是一个非常适合旅行的天气，方便游览岛屿和体验游戏。

但是，有一点需要注意的是，从 5 月到 7 月，芽庄从夏季开始，所以天气会阳光很多。 因此，请确保您有足够的防晒霜来保护您的皮肤！

如何搬到芽庄？

芽庄地处交通便利的位置，拥有多种交通工具。 如果您想去芽庄，您可以通过 3 种主要方式旅行：飞机、火车和客车。

乘坐飞机的交通工具

庆和的航空业非常发达，每周有许多从各省到这里的往返航班。 要来芽庄，您将降落在金兰机场（庆和），然后您可以乘坐出租车或巴士前往芽庄。 从金兰机场到芽庄的距离约为 40 公里，通常需要 30 多分钟的路程。

如果前往芽庄，这种交通工具是首选。

对于乘坐火车旅行的车辆

芽庄站位于芽庄市中心。 这也是位于南北铁路线上的一个地方。

目前，这种交通工具有许多五星级服务，尤其是西贡 - 芽庄路线。 您可以通过越南铁路部门的网站 dsvn.vn 预订车票，选择您最喜欢的火车位置和车厢。 你应该选择夜车，因为如果你在西贡，两地之间的旅行时间只有8个小时左右。 当你到达时，正好是早上，你可以马上进入游戏。

乘坐巴士的车辆

目前，道路交通路线非常发达，因此乘坐巴士前往芽庄也很方便。 在芽庄，有2个大汽车站，分别是芽庄北部汽车站和芽庄南部汽车站。 这两个巴士站距离芽庄市只有几公里，因此前往市中心非常方便。 您可以在网站上预订巴士票，以最方便的方式前往芽庄。

在芽庄的交通工具

对于位于芽庄市中心的地方，您可以选择骑摩托车或出租车。 芽庄的摩托车租赁价格从 100000 到 150000 VND/天不等，具体取决于类型。

芽庄的道路很容易走，只要按照谷歌地图的指示去市中心的吃饭或玩耍的地方。 在芽庄，有许多著名的出租车公司供您选择。

如果你喜欢在海上开车看芽庄的感觉，摩托车是一个非常不错的选择。 尤其是在清晨或傍晚，在延伸的 Tran Phu 街上开车兜风，您可以轻松欣赏芽庄的全景。 这可能会给您留下难忘的印象。 让我们试试吧！

如果您不知道，请参考以下一些信誉良好的摩托车租赁地址：

海防旅游公司。 地址：位于 96A Tran Phu Street - Nha Trang。 热线：0969550460 – (0583) 500050 VND VietDream Company。 地址 3B Hung Vuong - Nha Trang。 热线：0935605963 – 09009094478

芽庄摩托车租赁公司。 地址 14C Mac Dinh Chi - Nha Trang。 热线：0989164817

自己去芽庄旅游住哪里？

来芽庄推荐 10 家 4 星酒店和度假村：

天秤座芽庄

这家酒店位于 1/32 Tran Quang Khai - Nha Trang。 这个地方距离芽庄海滩不到 150m，位于市中心，因此非常靠近旅游景点。

芽庄罗萨卡酒店

地址：Nguyen Thien Thuat - Nha Trang 147 号。 这也是一家位于芽庄市中心的酒店。

芽庄诺富特酒店

芽庄阿米安娜别墅度假村

地址：范文东-芽庄。 芽庄米亚度假村

地址：Bai Dong, Cam Hai Dong, Cam Ranh。 这个度假村位于金兰机场附近，而不是在芽庄的中心。 如果您正在度假，这将是一个不错的选择。

一个人去芽庄玩什么？

土平海域

来到芽庄，不可能忽视Tu Binh 海滩。 这是一个与 Binh Ba、Binh Hung 的 2 个岛屿和 Binh Lap 和 Binh Tien 的 2 个海滩相关的地方。

平巴岛

这是一个非常美丽的岛屿，近年来已成名。 说到平巴，人们经常提到龙虾，因为这里的龙虾很多。 但如果不提这里美丽的珊瑚礁，那就太失职了。 如果您来平巴，您应该体验珊瑚潜水服务。 平巴岛的珊瑚离海面很近，很容易看到，也很安全。

平兴岛

平雄岛是一个离平巴岛很近的小岛。 在著名的 Binh Tien - Vinh Hy 沿海通道上旅行时，您可以轻松看到这个岛屿。 要到这个岛，你必须搬到Kinh 海滩租船到岛上。 平立海滩

这是一个延伸到大陆的海滩。 这里的海水清澈而不深。 我们可以骑摩托车或汽车到达这里。 此外，它们也被认为是一个小半岛，并拥有通往大海的美丽小径。

平田海滩

这是一个非常美丽的海滩，有白色的沙滩，有点狂野。 这里的海水非常清澈湛蓝。 不仅如此，他们还有一个被森林包围的部分，有许多有趣的堆叠岩石。

珍珠地

这也是芽庄非常有名的地方。 一个你应该花一整天来体验这里所有游戏和活动的地方。 服务包括缆车穿越大海、室内外游戏、从冒险到温柔、与欧式城堡合影、水上乐园玩耍……

叠山岛

叠山岛位于芽庄北部，这个地方以越南最独特的跨海公路而闻名。 事实上，Diep Son 并不是一个岛屿的名字。 它们是一系列 3 个小岛的名称：Hon Bip - Hon Giua - Hon Duoc。 它们位于庆和省范嘉镇范丰湾水域。 在叠山岛，不仅有一条隔海的公路，还有两条连续的公路。 大多数人来去去的道路是连接Hon Bip和Hon Giua的700m长的道路。 剩下的跨海公路长 200 米，连接 Hon Giua 和 Hon Duoc。 乘独木舟前往叠山岛时，独木舟通常会带您前往最大的岛屿 Hon Bip。 走两条路大约需要2个小时。 这里的海水很清澈，走在这些路上，很容易就能看到海底。

波纳加塔

中部地区被称为许多世纪前占族人居住的地方。 因此，这里建有许多占婆塔。 包括波纳加塔。 这是一个吸引很多游客的地方，是芽庄不容错过的地方。 这是占婆塔区，位置非常漂亮。 他们有独特的建筑，有着非常悠久的历史。

宁凡湾

这是芽庄著名的美丽海湾之一。 长期以来，这里已成为众多游客心目中理想的旅游胜地和理想的度假胜地。 蔚蓝的天空，碧蓝的海面，绿树成荫，自然得天独厚。

要搬到宁凡湾，您只需要沿着公路 DT651 到 1A 国道。 到宁和镇，你继续开车到TL625D，经过宁静镇宁福镇到达宁凡湾。

独自前往芽庄时吃什么 - 探索芽庄美食

在芽庄买什么礼物？

这里有一些关于dac san Nha Trang特产作为去芽庄旅行时的礼物的建议，你可以参考一下。

特色干货——海鲜

这是一个沿海城市，所以这里的海鲜非常新鲜可口。 因此，海味干货是送礼的合理选择。 您应该考虑的一些干海鲜是鱿鱼，芽庄的干虾，奶蟹，干鱼等。

可以说庆和的燕窝对很多人来说太熟悉了。 这是来芽庄的著名特产。 燕窝除了营养丰富外，也是一种优质的礼物。 因为这里是专门饲养和生产燕窝的地方，可以说这里的价格非常合理。 所以不用太担心价格！

芽庄柠檬辣椒盐

柠檬辣椒盐被认为是芽庄的特产。 这是在芽庄吃海鲜时不可缺少的蘸酱。 柠檬与盐的咸味和辣椒的辣味以及其他由海人秘制制成的香料的混合，使芽庄柠檬辣椒盐比其他地方更特别。

鱼露，芽庄

在芽庄，有许多著名的鱼露制作村。 所以一小瓶鱼露作为礼物将是一个不错的选择。

宁和酸春卷

这绝对是来芽庄不可错过的特色菜。 长期以来，宁和春卷征服了许多来芽庄的游客。 除了在这里享受之外，它们还被选为礼物。

庆和葡萄海藻

众所周知，葡萄海藻是一种营养丰富的海藻。 它们具有抗衰老和稳定血压的作用。 此外，它们还有许多其他功效，所以现在很多人都选择葡萄紫菜作为日常用品。

以上是您自己前往芽庄时的所有信息。 希望这是对你有用的参考。 祝您有一个愉快而难忘的芽庄之旅！

艾米对此的 Vue - Jun 2 6月2日



原文:

Every year, Nha Trang attracts a large number of domestic and foreign tour Nha Trang 1 ngay to this city. It is known for its beautiful beaches and diverse cuisine. So, for those who come here for the first time, what should be noted? Please refer to this self-sufficient travel experience from A to Z from A to Z !

When should you come to Nha Trang?

Nha Trang city is located in a stretch of land of the South Central Coast. Therefore, the weather in Nha Trang is clearly differentiated by two seasons, sunny and rainy.

The dry season in Nha Trang falls from January to July, which can last until August. The rainy season usually starts from September to the end of November. Therefore, the best time to come to Nha Trang is around. February to July. At this time, Nha Trang's weather is very beautiful, the sky is clear and sunny. This is a very suitable weather for travel and easy to visit the islands and experience the games.

However, there is a small note that from May to July, Nha Trang starts in the summer, so the weather will be much sunnier. So make sure you have enough sunscreen to protect your skin!

How to move to Nha Trang?

Nha Trang is located in a convenient traffic location, with many means of transportation. If you want to go to Nha Trang, you can travel by 3 main means: plane, train and passenger car.

For means of transportation by plane

Aviation in Khanh Hoa is very developed, weekly there are many round-trip flights from provinces to here. To come to Nha Trang, you will land at Cam Ranh airport (Khanh Hoa) then you can travel by taxi or bus to Nha Trang. The distance from Cam Ranh airport to Nha Trang is about 40km and it usually takes more than 30 minutes to travel.

If traveling to Nha Trang, this means of transport is the most preferred option.

For vehicles traveling by train

Nha Trang Station is located right in the heart of Nha Trang city. This is also a locality located right on the North-South railway line.

Currently, there are many 5-star services for this means of transport, especially the Saigon - Nha Trang route. You can book tickets through the website dsvn.vn of the Vietnam Railways Department to choose your favorite train location and compartment. You should choose the night train, because if you are in Saigon, the travel time between the two places is only about 8 hours. When you arrive, it's just morning, you can enter the game right away.

For vehicles traveling by bus

Currently, the road traffic routes are very developed, so traveling by bus to Nha Trang is also easy. In Nha Trang, there are 2 big bus stations, which are the northern bus station of Nha Trang and the southern bus station of Nha Trang. These two bus stations are only a few kilometers from Nha Trang city, so moving to the center is very convenient. You can go to the website to book bus tickets to move to Nha Trang in the most convenient way.

Means of transportation in Nha Trang

For places located in the center of Nha Trang city, you can choose to travel by motorbike or taxi. The price of motorbike rental in Nha Trang ranges from 100000 to 150000 VND/day depending on the type.

Nha Trang roads are very easy to go, just follow the instructions of google map to go to places to eat or play in the heart of the city. In Nha Trang, there are many reputable taxi companies for you to choose from.

If you like the feeling of driving on the sea to see Nha Trang, motorbike is a very good choice. Especially in the early morning or evening, by driving around on the extended Tran Phu street, you can easily enjoy the panoramic view of Nha Trang. This will probably be an unforgettable impression for you. Let's try it!

Please refer to some reputable motorbike rental addresses below if you do not know:

Hai Phong travel company. Address: located on 96A Tran Phu Street - Nha Trang. Hotline: 0969550460 – (0583) 500050 VND VietDream Company. Address 3B Hung Vuong - Nha Trang. Hotline: 0935605963 – 09009094478

Nha Trang motorbike rental company. Address 14C Mac Dinh Chi - Nha Trang. Hotline: 0989164817

Where to stay when traveling to Nha Trang on your own?

Suggest 10 4* hotels and resorts to stay in when coming to Nha Trang:

DXT Hotel Nha Trang

Located at 3A Quan Tran, Hung Vuong, Nha Trang. The location is right in the city center and only about 200m from Nha Trang beach.

Libra Nha Trang

This hotel is located in the city center and is located at 4 Hung Vuong - Nha Trang. Only 5 minutes walk from 2/4 Square and Tram Huong Tower

Green Beach Hotel Nha Trang

This hotel is located at 1/32 Tran Quang Khai - Nha Trang. This place is less than 150m from Nha Trang beach and located in the heart of the city, so it is very close to tourist attractions.

Nagar Hotel Nha Trang

Located at 1I Quan Tran - Nha Trang, this is the central route of the city, so it is very convenient to move and have fun.

Virgo Hotel Nha Trang

Address at 39-41 Nguyen Thi Minh Khai - Nha Trang. About 300m from the sea and located in the center of the city.

Rigel Nha Trang

Address: No. 86/4 Tran Phu - Nha Trang. This is a very convenient location because it is located right on the extended Tran Phu Street.

Rosaka Nha Trang Hotel

Address: No. 147 Nguyen Thien Thuat - Nha Trang. This is also a hotel located in the center of Nha Trang.

Novotel Nha Trang Hotel

Address: 50 Tran Phu Street - Nha Trang. This is a relatively prime location because it is right on the main road.

Resort & Villas Amiana Nha Trang

Address: Pham Van Dong - Nha Trang. Amiana Resort Nha Trang has a private beach area and views overlooking the Nha Trang sea.

Mia Resort Nha Trang

Address: Bai Dong, Cam Hai Dong, Cam Ranh. This resort is located near Cam Ranh airport and not in the center of Nha Trang. If you are on vacation, this will be a great choice.

What to play when traveling to Nha Trang on your own?

Tu Binh sea area

Coming to Nha Trang, it is impossible to ignore Tu Binh beach. This is a place associated with 2 islands of Binh Ba, Binh Hung and 2 beaches of Binh Lap and Binh Tien.

Binh Ba Island

This is a very beautiful island and has become famous in recent years. When it comes to Binh Ba, people often mention lobster, because there are a lot of lobsters here. But it would be remiss not to mention the beautiful coral reefs here. If you have come to Binh Ba, you should experience the coral diving service. The corals in Binh Ba Island are very close to the sea surface, easy to see and also very safe.

Binh Hung Island

Binh Hung Island is a small island quite close to Binh Ba Island. You can easily see this island when traveling on the famous coastal pass of Binh Tien - Vinh Hy. To get to this island, you have to move to Kinh beach to rent a boat to the island. Binh Hung Island has not been exploited much, so it still retains its wild charm and charm.

Binh Lap Beach

The weather in Binh Lap is very pleasant and cool. This is a beach that extends to the mainland. The sea water here is clear and not deep. We can travel by motorbike or car to get here. In addition, they are also considered a small peninsula and have beautiful trails leading to the sea.

Binh Tien Beach

This is a very beautiful beach, with white sand and a bit wild. The sea water here is very clear and blue. Binh Tien beach has a section surrounded by a row of tall casuarina trees. Not only that, they also have a section surrounded by forests with lots of interesting stacked rocks.

Vinpearl Land

This is also an extremely famous place in Nha Trang. A place where you should spend a full day to experience all the games and activities here. Services include such as cable car crossing the sea, indoor and outdoor games, from adventurous to gentle, and taking pictures with European-style castles, playing at water parks...

Diep Son Island

Diep Son Island is located in the North of Nha Trang, this place is famous for the most unique sea crossing roads in Vietnam. In fact, Diep Son is not the name of an island. They are the name of a series of 3 small islands: Hon Bip - Hon Giua - Hon Duoc. They are located in the waters of Van Phong Bay, Van Gia town, Khanh Hoa province. In Diep Son Island, there is not only one road across the sea, but also two continuous roads. The road most people come and go to is the 700m long road connecting Hon Bip and Hon Giua. The remaining road across the sea is 200m long connecting between Hon Giua and Hon Duoc. When taking a canoe to Diep Son island, the canoe will often take you to the largest island, Hon Bip. It takes about 2 hours to walk both roads. The sea water here is very clear, when walking on these roads, you can easily see the seabed.

Ponagar tower

The Central region is known as the place where the Cham people lived many centuries ago. Therefore, there are many Cham towers built here. Including the Ponagar tower. Ponagar Tower is located right in the center of Nha Trang beach town. This is a place that attracts a lot of tourists and is a place not to be missed in Nha Trang. This is the Cham tower area with a very beautiful location. They have a unique architecture and have a very long history.

Ninh Van Bay

Ninh Van Bay is located on Hon Meo peninsula, about 60km from Nha Trang city. This is one of the famous beautiful bays in Nha Trang. For a long time, this place has become an ideal tourist destination as well as an ideal resort in the hearts of many tourists. The landscape here is favored by nature with azure sky, turquoise blue sea surface and shaded by trees.

To move to Ninh Van Bay, you just need to follow the road DT651 to National Highway 1A. To Ninh Hoa town, you continue to drive to TL625D, pass Ninh Phuoc town, Ninh Tinh to reach Ninh Van bay.

What to eat when traveling to Nha Trang on your own - Discover Nha Trang cuisine

Must try dishes in Nha Trang

If you come to Nha Trang, in addition to the must-see tourist attractions, do not miss the following dishes:

Ninh Hoa grilled spring rolls Nha Trang jellyfish vermicelli Fish noodles Grilled Lobster Nha Trang chicken rice Nha Trang shallot soup cake Banh Can Nha Trang Nha Trang shrimp and squid pancakes Dien Khanh wet cake

What to buy in Nha Trang as a gift?

Here are some suggestions for dac san Nha Trang specialties as gifts when traveling to Nha Trang, you can refer to it.

Dried specialties – Seafood

This is a coastal city so the seafood here is very fresh and delicious. Therefore, dried seafood is a reasonable choice for gifts. Some dried seafood you should consider are squid, dried shrimp in Nha Trang, milk crab, dried fish, etc.

Khanh Hoa Salanganes'Nest

It can be said that Khanh Hoa's bird's nest is too familiar to many people. This is a famous specialty when coming to Nha Trang. In addition to having a high nutritional content, bird's nest is also a premium and quality gift. Because this is a place specializing in raising and producing bird's nests, it can be said that the price here is very reasonable. So no need to worry too much about the price!

Nha Trang lemon chili salt

Lemon chili salt is considered a specialty in Nha Trang. This is an indispensable dipping sauce when eating seafood in Nha Trang. The blend of lemon with the salty taste of salt and the spiciness of chili along with other spices made by the secret of the sea people makes Nha Trang lemon chili salt more special than other places.

Fish sauce, Nha Trang

In Nha Trang, there are many famous fish sauce making villages. So a small bottle of fish sauce as a gift will be a great choice.

Ninh Hoa sour spring rolls

This is definitely a specialty not to be missed when coming to Nha Trang. For a long time, Ninh Hoa spring rolls have conquered many visitors to Nha Trang. In addition to enjoying here, they are also selected as gifts.

Khanh Hoa grape seaweed

Grape seaweed is known to be a type of seaweed with high nutritional content. They have anti-aging effects and stabilize blood pressure. In addition, they also have a number of other effects, so now grape seaweed is chosen by many people for daily use.

Above is all the information when traveling to Nha Trang on your own . Hope this is a useful reference for you. Wish you have a happy and memorable trip to Nha Trang!
